description.value: Codes for the encoding used in molecular definition literal representations, based on IUPAC standards for nucleotide and amino acid sequences.

definition.value: Single-letter DNA nucleotide codes (A, C, G, T) without ambiguity codes. Based on IUPAC symbols.
Single-letter RNA nucleotide codes (A, C, G, U) without ambiguity codes. Based on IUPAC symbols.

display.value: Nucleotide, 1-letter, no ambiguity except N, DNA residues

definition.value: Single-letter DNA nucleotide codes (A, C, G, T, N) where N represents any nucleotide. Based on IUPAC symbols.
Single-letter DNA nucleotide codes with ambiguity codes (A, C, G, T, R, Y, M, K, S, W, H, B, V, D, N). Based on IUPAC symbols.
Single-letter RNA nucleotide codes with ambiguity codes. Based on IUPAC symbols.
Standard single-letter amino acid codes for the 20 common amino acids without ambiguity codes (A, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, K, L, M, N, P, Q, R, S, T, V, W, Y). Based on IUPAC symbols.

Three-letter amino acid codes for the 20 common amino acids without ambiguity codes (Ala, Arg, Asn, Asp, Cys, Gln, Glu, Gly, His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Pro, Ser, Thr, Trp, Tyr, Val). Based on IUPAC symbols.
Single-letter amino acid codes with ambiguity codes (A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, K, L, M, N, P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, W, X, Y, Z). Based on IUPAC symbols.
Three-letter amino acid codes with ambiguity codes (Ala, Arg, Asn, Asp, Cys, Gln, Glu, Gly, His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Pro, Ser, Thr, Trp, Tyr, Val, Asx, Sec, Xaa, Glx). Based on IUPAC symbols.
